title: Tests 3
description: Tests can include custom failure messages to provide more context when a test fails.
instructions: Add custom messages to the assert macros for better test output.
hints: Assert macros accept an optional message after the condition.
The message uses format string syntax: "Expected {} to be valid", email
Custom messages help understand test failures quickly.
explanation: All assert macros (`assert!`, `assert_eq!`, `assert_ne!`) support custom failure messages. After the required arguments, you can add a format string and values, just like `println!`. Good test messages explain what was expected, making it easier to diagnose failures without reading the test code.
